title: A new reality for the crypto market
author: godlyshoplifting64
selftext:
Don't you think it's incredibly simple to make money these days? Especially from the time when crypto demonstrated its capabilities. Perhaps not at its peak, but the times when we all thought crypto is only for the criminal have passed.

The market is now flooded with new attributes and completely new currencies. Many businesses began issuing both shares and tokens at the same time. Tokenization is used as a guarantee of ability and functioning by certain organizations that are stated on the blockchain and DeFi. The pricing reflects the status, the terms, or the specific service. But anything may happen, and there are still several price manipulation schemes. The price does not imply that the project is trustworthy. Artificial demand may be generated in a variety of ways. However, there aren't as many tools to conceal the service's true capabilities. And frequently, financial organizations forget their founders, users, and customers. 

If we take into consideration such projects like BIND with its goals, we see the birth of a completely new ecosystem which is concentrated on its users but not the token as well. It is not the company that is greedy to the reputation and external indicators as for the comfort and utility that clients will get. It is the bridge between crypto and fiat as it is. The Bind coin serves as the foundation of the Bind ecosystem. It will promote network membership via financial incentives and financial advantages. Token ownership will be utilized to improve the platform's user experience, cut costs, and provide an additional source of income for token holders. It provides BIND merchants and consumers with a tradeable asset with significant upside potential, a liquid market, and monthly dividends.

Only thing customers have to do is keep doing what they're always doing…
